name: omni-model
description: Self-hosted OpenAI-compatible AI proxy with YAML-configured auth, rate limits and model routing.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key (if the openai provider is configured)

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key (if the anthropic provider is configured)

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key (if the google provider is configured)

OMNI_CONFIG.description: Inline YAML configuration (overrides the omni.yaml baked into the image)
